info.title: Bayaw Jobs API
info.description:
## Overview
    API for the Bayaw Jobs platform. Supports user authentication, applicant onboarding, profile management, and resume uploads.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, and token management

tempAuth.description: Temporary token received from login endpoint

post.description: Create a new user account. A verification email will be sent to the provided email address.

password.description: Must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, and one special character

message.example: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.

password: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

get.description: Verify user email using the token sent to their email address during registration.

post.description: Authenticate user credentials. If valid, a 6-digit verification code will be sent to their email.

message.example: Verification code sent to your email

temp_token.description: Temporary token to use in verify-auth endpoint

expires_in.description: Token expiry time in seconds (5 minutes)

message.example: Please verify your email before logging in

post.description: Verify the 6-digit code sent to user email. Returns access token and sets refresh token in HTTP-only cookie.

access_token.description: JWT access token. Payload includes: user_id, email, role, first_name, last_name. Also includes applicant_profile_id if the user has an applicant profile, and company_id if the user is a member of a company.

post.description: Issues a new access token using the `refreshToken` HTTP-only cookie automatically sent by the browser. The old refresh token is revoked and a new one is issued (token rotation). The new refresh token is set as an HTTP-only cookie (`refreshToken`, 7-day expiry, SameSite=Strict). No request body or Authorization header is required — the cookie is sent automatically.

parameters.name: refreshToken
parameters.description: HTTP-only refresh token cookie set during login or a previous refresh.

Set-Cookie.description: Rotated refresh token set as an HTTP-only cookie. Name: `refreshToken`. Expires in 7 days. HttpOnly, SameSite=Strict.

schema.example: refreshToken=eyJhbGci...; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Path=/; Max-Age=604800

accessToken.description: New JWT access token. Valid for 3 hours. Payload includes: user_id, email, role, first_name, last_name. Also includes applicant_profile_id if the user has an applicant profile, and company_id if the user is a member of a company.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired refresh token cookie

post.description: Logout the user by invalidating the refresh token from HTTP-only cookie. Clears the cookie.

schema.example: refreshToken=; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Path=/; Max-Age=0

post.description: Logout the user from all devices by invalidating all refresh tokens. Requires Bearer authentication.

401.description: Unauthorized - No token or invalid token

post.description: Sends a password reset link to the provided email address if an account exists and is verified. Always returns a generic success response to prevent email enumeration. The reset link expires in 15 minutes. No authentication required.

200.description: Request processed — reset email sent if account exists

message.example: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

post.description: Resets the user's password using the reset token received in the password reset email. The token is passed as a URL parameter. The token is valid for 15 minutes. All existing sessions are revoked after a successful reset — the user must log in again. No authentication required.

parameters.name: reset_password_token
parameters.description: The password reset token received via email.

new_password.description: Must be at least 8 characters and contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.

message.example: Password reset successfully. Please log in again.

400.description: Validation error or passwords do not match

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password for verification. All existing sessions (refresh tokens) are revoked after a successful update — the user must log in again. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

new_password.description: Must be at least 8 characters and contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character. Must differ from current password.

message.example: Password updated successfully. Please log in again.

400.description: Validation error or incorrect current password

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the authenticated user's login sessions (refresh tokens), ordered by most recent. Each entry includes device info, location, and session status.

post.description: Submits the full applicant profile including education, experience, skills, and languages. First name and last name are taken from the authenticated user's registration data — they do not need to be provided here. Accepts `multipart/form-data`: send all JSON fields as a stringified JSON string in the `data` field, and attach a PDF resume in the `resume` field (required). Automatically uploads the default profile picture to the `profile-picture` Supabase bucket. Marks the user as having completed onboarding. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

data.description: Stringified JSON containing the onboarding payload (profile, education, experience, skills, languages).

application/json.description: JSON body (without resume). Use multipart/form-data to include a resume.

career_status.description: Defaults to ACTIVELY_LOOKING if not provided.

profile_picture.description: Filename stored in the profile-picture Supabase bucket

profile_picture_url.description: API endpoint to retrieve the profile picture. Null if no picture has been uploaded.

resume_url.description: API endpoint to retrieve the resume PDF. Null if no resume has been uploaded.
API endpoint to retrieve the uploaded resume PDF. No authentication required.

400.description: Validation error or onboarding already completed

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

409.description: Applicant profile or email already exists

get.description: Returns the authenticated applicant's full profile including education, experience, skills, languages, and resumes.

profile_picture.description: Filename stored in the profile-picture Supabase bucket

profile_picture_url.description: API endpoint to retrieve the profile picture. Null if no picture has been uploaded.

resume_url.description: API endpoint to retrieve the resume PDF. Null if no resume has been uploaded.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

patch.description: Updates the authenticated applicant's profile fields. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated. At least one field must be provided. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

400.description: Validation error or no fields provided

message.example: At least one field must be provided

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.description: Returns all education entries for the authenticated applicant's profile.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.description: Returns all work experience entries for the authenticated applicant's profile.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.description: Returns the authenticated applicant's current career status.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

patch.description: Updates the authenticated applicant's career status.

message.example: career_status must be one of: ACTIVELY_LOOKING, OPEN_TO_OPPORTUNITIES, EMPLOYED_NOT_LOOKING, NOT_LOOKING

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

post.description: Adds a new education entry to the authenticated applicant's profile. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

delete.description: Deletes a specific education entry belonging to the authenticated applicant's profile. Returns 404 if the entry does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated user. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile or education entry not found

patch.description: Updates a specific education entry belonging to the authenticated applicant's profile. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated. At least one field must be provided. Returns 404 if the entry does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated user. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

400.description: Validation error, no fields provided, or entry does not belong to this profile

message.example: At least one field must be provided

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile or education entry not found

post.description: Adds a new work experience entry to the authenticated applicant's profile. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

patch.description: Updates a specific work experience entry belonging to the authenticated applicant's profile. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated. At least one field must be provided. Returns 404 if the entry does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated user. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

400.description: Validation error or no fields provided

message.example: At least one field must be provided

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile or experience entry not found

delete.description: Deletes a specific work experience entry belonging to the authenticated applicant's profile. Returns 404 if the entry does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated user. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile or experience entry not found

get.description: Returns all language entries for the authenticated applicant's profile.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

post.description: Adds a new language entry to the authenticated applicant's profile.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

patch.description: Updates a specific language entry belonging to the authenticated applicant's profile. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated. At least one field must be provided.

400.description: Validation error or no fields provided

message.example: At least one field must be provided

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile or language entry not found

delete.description: Deletes a specific language entry belonging to the authenticated applicant's profile.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile or language entry not found

get.description: Streams an applicant's resume as a PDF by their profile ID. The file is proxied through the API — the Supabase storage URL is never exposed to the client. No authentication required.

404.description: Applicant profile or resume not found

patch.description: Uploads a new PDF resume for the authenticated applicant. Replaces the existing resume (one resume per applicant). Requires the applicant to have completed onboarding first.

url.description: API endpoint to retrieve the updated resume PDF.

400.description: No file provided or invalid file type

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile not found — complete onboarding first

get.description: Streams an applicant's profile picture by their profile ID. The image is proxied through the API — the Supabase storage URL is never exposed. No authentication required.

404.description: Applicant profile or profile picture not found

patch.description: Uploads a new profile picture for the authenticated applicant. Accepts JPEG, PNG, or WebP images up to 5MB. Replaces the existing profile picture in storage. Requires the applicant to have completed onboarding.

picture.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP). Maximum size: 5MB.

profile_picture.description: Filename stored in the profile-picture Supabase bucket.

url.description: API endpoint to retrieve the profile picture. No authentication required.

400.description: No file provided or unsupported image format

message.example: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are allowed

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Applicant profile not found — complete onboarding first

get.description: Returns all skills for the authenticated applicant's profile.

post.description: Add one or more skills to the applicant profile. Returns the full updated skills list.

400.description: Validation error — at least one skill required

post.description: Submit an application for a job posting. The applicant must have completed onboarding. Duplicate applications to the same job are rejected. Only jobs with status `OPEN` accept applications.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: ID of the job to apply for

400.description: Job is no longer accepting applications (not OPEN)

404.description: Job not found or applicant profile not found (onboarding not completed)

409.description: You have already applied to this job

get.description: Returns the 3 most recent job applications that are not yet resolved (excludes HIRED, REJECTED, CANCELLED). Requires authentication.
Returns the total application count and per-status counts for the authenticated applicant.
Returns a paginated list of all job applications for the authenticated applicant. Default limit is 4.

get.summary: Get top 6 companies by open job count
get.description: Returns the 6 companies with the most open job postings. No authentication required.
Returns a paginated list of companies that have posted at least one job. Includes available industries for filter UI. No authentication required.

industries.description: All distinct industries across companies with jobs — use for filter dropdown

post.description: Create a company profile. Accepts multipart/form-data with an optional `logo` image and a `data` field containing the JSON payload.

logo.description: Company logo image (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)

data.description: JSON string containing company onboarding data

patch.description: Upload a new logo for the authenticated user's company.

logo.description: New company logo (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)

get.description: Retrieve the company logo image by company ID.
Retrieve all admins of the authenticated user's company, along with the requesting user's own admin record (`my_rights`) showing their permissions.

profile_picture.description: Stored filename in the profile picture bucket, null if not uploaded

profile_picture_url.description: Serve URL for the profile picture, null if not uploaded

my_rights.description: The requesting user's own admin record. `null` if the user is not listed as an admin (e.g., a system ADMIN role).

422.description: Company ID missing from token — user has no company

post.description: Add a new admin to the authenticated user's company. Only admins with full rights (can_create, can_read, can_update, can_delete all set to `true`) can perform this action. The `company_id` is derived from the authenticated user's JWT.

user_id.description: ID of the user to grant admin access

409.description: User is already an admin of this company

422.description: Company ID missing from token — user has no company

delete.description: Remove an admin from the authenticated user's company by admin record ID. Only admins with full rights can perform this action. An admin cannot remove themselves.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The company_admin record ID to remove

403.description: Insufficient permissions — full rights required, or self-removal attempted

422.description: Company ID missing from token — user has no company

patch.description: Upload or replace the profile picture for the authenticated admin. Stored in the profile-picture bucket as `company_admin_<userId>.<ext>`.

picture.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)

422.description: Company ID missing from token

get.description: Serves the profile picture image for a given admin user. No authentication required.
Returns publicly visible company information. No authentication required.
Returns the authenticated user's full company profile including contact, socials, and locations.

422.description: Company ID missing from token

patch.description: Update basic company details. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

400.description: Validation error — at least one field required

422.description: Company ID missing from token

patch.description: Upsert social links for the company. Passing `null` for a platform removes that link. Only provided fields are processed.

422.description: Company ID missing from token

patch.description: Update company email and/or phone. At least one field is required.

400.description: Validation error — at least one field required

422.description: Company ID missing from token
Company ID missing from token
Company ID missing from token
Company ID missing from token

get.description: Returns a full dashboard snapshot for the authenticated user's company: summary counts, 8-week applicant trends, recent 5 applicants, and recent 5 job postings.

application_pipeline.description: Count and percentage of applicants for each status

applicant_trends.description: Weekly applicant counts for the past 8 weeks (oldest to newest)

recent_applicants.description: Most recent 5 applicants across all company jobs

422.description: Company ID missing from token — user has no company

get.summary: Get applicant info by application ID
get.description: Returns the full profile of an applicant who applied to one of the company's jobs, including skills, languages, experiences, education, resume link, and other positions they applied for within the same company. The `id` parameter is the `applicant_applied_job` record ID.

application.description: The specific application the company is viewing

other_applications.description: Other positions this applicant applied for within the same company

422.description: Company ID missing from token — user has no company

get.description: Returns job posting statistics for the authenticated user's company.

422.description: Company ID missing from token — user has no company

get.description: Returns applicant statistics for the authenticated user's company.

422.description: Company ID missing from token — user has no company

get.description: Returns the 8 most recently posted open jobs. No authentication required.

get.summary: Get all job postings with pagination and filters
get.description: Returns all OPEN job postings. Supports pagination, keyword search, and filters by job type, location, location type, and salary range.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by job title or department (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: min_salary
parameters.description: Minimum salary range filter — excludes jobs whose maximum salary is below this value

parameters.name: max_salary
parameters.description: Maximum salary range filter — excludes jobs whose minimum salary exceeds this value

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

get.summary: Get the 4 most popular open job postings
get.description: Returns the 4 open job postings with the highest number of applicants. No authentication required.

applicant_count.description: Number of applicants for this job

get.summary: Get the authenticated company's job postings
get.description: Returns all job postings belonging to the authenticated user's company, resolved from the JWT token. Supports pagination via page and limit query parameters.

422.description: User has no company — company_id missing from JWT token

get.summary: Get all applicants across the company's job postings
get.description: Returns a paginated list of all job applications submitted to any of the authenticated company's jobs. Each record includes basic applicant profile info and the job they applied to.

422.description: User has no company — company_id missing from JWT token

get.summary: Get a company job posting with its applicants
get.description: Returns a specific job posting belonging to the authenticated user's company, along with all applicants who have applied for that job. The job must belong to the company in the JWT token.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the job to retrieve

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

404.description: Job not found or does not belong to the authenticated company

422.description: User has no company — company_id missing from JWT token

get.summary: Get a job posting by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the job to retrieve

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

put.description: Updates a job posting. Both the user and company are resolved from the JWT token. The update is scoped to the authenticated user's company — the job must belong to their company or the request will fail. All body fields are optional; at least one must be provided.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the job to update

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

status.description: Job posting status. Defaults to OPEN if not provided.

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

400.description: Bad request - validation errors or missing fields

403.description: Forbidden - only authorized company users can perform this action

message.example: Only authorized company users can create job postings

404.description: Job not found or does not belong to the authenticated company

422.description: User has no company — company_id missing from JWT token

message.example: Company ID is required to update a job

post.description: Creates a job posting under the authenticated user's company. The company is resolved automatically from the JWT token — no company_id is required in the request body. The token must include a company_id (i.e. the user must have completed company onboarding).

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

status.description: Job posting status. Defaults to OPEN if not provided.

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

400.description: Bad request - validation errors or missing fields

403.description: Forbidden - only authorized company users can perform this action

message.example: Only authorized company users can create job postings

422.description: User has no company — company_id missing from JWT token

message.example: Company ID is required to create a job

patch.description: Updates the status of a job posting. Only authorized company users (owner or can_update) can change the status. The job must belong to the authenticated user's company.

description.example: We are looking for a skilled engineer...

message.example: status must be one of: OPEN, CLOSED, PAUSED

403.description: Forbidden - only authorized company users can perform this action

message.example: Only authorized company users can create job postings

404.description: Job not found or does not belong to the authenticated company

422.description: User has no company — company_id missing from JWT token
